 matchRate: z.number(),\n288\t    consecutiveFailures: z.number(),\n289\t    circuitOpen: z.boolean(),\n290\t    unmatchedCount: z.number(),\n291\t  }),\n292\t  delayDetector: z.object({\n293\t failingFeedsCount: z.number(),\n312\t});\n313\t\n314\tconst StationSchema = z.object({\n315\t  id: z.string(),\n316\t  name: z.string(),\n317\t  lat: z.number(),\n318\t  lon: z.number(),\n319\t  lines: z.array(z.string()),\n320\t  northStopId: z.string(),\n321\t  southStopId: z.string(),\n322\t  transfers: z.array(\n323\t    z.object({\n324\t      toStationId: z.string(),\n325\t      toLines: z.string().optional(),\n333\t});\n334\t\n335\tconst RouteSchema = z.object({\n336\t  id: z.string(),\n337\t  shortName: z.string(),\n338\t  longName: z.string(),\n339\t  color: z.string(),\n340\t  textColor: z.string(),\n341\t  feedId: z.string(),\n342\t  division: z.enum([\"A\", \"B\"]),\n343\t  stops: z.array(z.string()),\n344\t});\n345\t\n346\tconst AlertsResponseSchema = z.object({\n347\t  alerts: z.array(\n348\t    z.object({\n349\t      id: z.string(),\n350\t      severity: z.enum([\"info\", \"warning\", \"severe\"]),\n351\t      source: z.enum([\"official\", \"predicted\"]),\n352\t z.number(),\n395\t  walkingOption: z.any().optional(),\n396\t});\n397\t\n398\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n399\t// Test helpers\n400\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n401\t\n402\tfunction createTestApp(): Hono {\n403\t  return createApp(STATIONS, ROUTES, COMPLEXES, TRANSFERS, \"/nonexistent/dist\");\n404\t}\n405\t\n406\t/**\n407\t * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n408\t * Makes a GET request to /api/csrf-token and extracts the token.\n409\t */\n410\tasync function getCsrfToken(app: Hono): Promise<string> {\n411\t  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n412\t  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n413\t  const body = await res.json();\n414\t  return body.token as string;\n415\t}\n416\t\n417\t/**\n418\t * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n419\t * Gets a fresh token and includes it in the X-CSRF-Token header.\n420\t */\n421\tasync function _requestWithCsrf(\n422\t  app: Hono,\n423\t  path: string,\n424\t  options: RequestInit = {}\n425\t): Promise<Response> {\n426\t  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n427\t  return app.request(path, {\n428\t    ...options,\n429\t    headers: {\n430\t      ...options.headers,\n431\t      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n432\t    },\n433\t  });\n434\t}\n435\t\n436\t/**\n437\t * Helper to make an authenticated state-changing request with CSRF token.\n438\t * Combines API key authentication with CSRF protection.\n439\t */\n440\tasync function requestWithAuthAndCsrf(\n441\t  app: Hono,\n442\t  path: string,\n443\t  options: RequestInit = {}\n444\t): Promise<Response> {\n445\t  const credentials = await createTestUserCredentials();\n446\t  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n447\t  return app.request(path, {\n448\t    ...options,\n449\t    headers: {\n450\t      Authorization: credentials.authorizationHeader,\n451\t      ...options.headers,\n452\t      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n453\t    },\n454\t  });\n455\t}\n456\t\n457\t/**\n458\t * Helper to make an authenticated admin request with CSRF token.\n459\t * Uses admin credentials for operations that require elevated privileges.\n460\t */\n461\tasync function requestWithAdminAndCsrf(\n462\t  app: Hono,\n463\t  path: string,\n464\t  options: RequestInit = {}\n465\t): Promise<Response> {\n466\t  const credentials = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n467\t  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n468\t  return app.request(path, {\n469\t    ...options,\n470\t    headers: {\n471\t      Authorization: credentials.authorizationHeader,\n472\t      ...options.headers,\n473\t      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n474\t    },\n475\t  });\n476\t}\n477\t\n478\t// createTestApp(): Hono {\n  return createApp(STATIONS, ROUTES, COMPLEXES, TRANSFERS, \"/nonexistent/dist\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n * Makes a GET request to /api/csrf-token and extracts the token.\n */\nasync function getCsrfToken(app: Hono): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n  const body = await res.json();\n  return body.token as string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n * Gets a fresh token and includes it in the X-CSRF-Token header.\n */\nasync function _requestWithCsrf(\n  app: Hono,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make an authenticated state-changing request with CSRF token.\n * Combines API key authentication with CSRF protection.\n */\nasync function requestWithAuthAndCsrf(\n  app: Hono,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const credentials = await createTestUserCredentials();\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      Authorization: credentials.authorizationHeader,\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make an authenticated admin request with CSRF token.\n * Uses admin credentials for operations that require elevated privileges.\n */\nasync function requestWithAdminAndCsrf(\n  app: Hono,\n  path: string,\n  options: RequestInit = {}\n): Promise<Response> {\n  const credentials = await createTestAdminCredentials();\n  const token = await getCsrfToken(app);\n  return app.request(path, {\n    ...options,\n    headers: {\n      Authorization: credentials.authorizationHeader,\n      ...options.headers,\n      \"X-CSRF-Token\": token,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// 503]).toContain(response.status());\n\n    const body = await response.json();\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"status\");\n    expect(body.status).toMatch(/^(ok|degraded)$/);\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"timestamp\");\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"uptime_seconds\");\n    // Allow uptime_seconds to be 0 on fresh server startup (<1s old)\n    expect(body.uptime_seconds).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0);\n  });\n\n  test(\"includes per-feed status for all 8 subway feeds\", async ({ request }) => {\n    const response = await request.get(\"/api/health\");\n    const body = await response.json();\n\n    expect(body.feeds).toBeInstanceOf(Array);\n    expect(body.feeds.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(8);\n\n    const feedIds = body.feeds.map((f: { id: string }) => f.id);\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-ace\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-bdfm\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-g\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-jz\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-l\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-nqrw\");\n    expect(feedIds).toContain(\"gtfs-si\");\n  });\n\n  test(\"includes alerts status\", async ({ request }) => {\n    const response = await request.get(\"/api/health\");\n    const body = await response.json();\n\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"alerts\");\n    expect(body.alerts).toHaveProperty(\"count\");\n    expect(body.alerts).toHaveProperty(\"circuitOpen\");\n    expect(typeof body.alerts.circuitOpen).toBe(\"boolean\");\n  });\n\n  test(\"includes memory usage metrics\", async ({ request }) => {\n    const response = await request.get(\"/api/health\");\n    const body = await response.json();\n\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"memory\");\n    expect(body.memory).toHaveProperty(\"rssBytes\");\n    expect(body.memory.rssBytes).toBeGreaterThan(0);\n    expect(body.memory).toHaveProperty(\"heapUsedBytes\");\n    expect(body.memory.heapUsedBytes).toBeGreaterThan(0);\n  });\n\n  test(\"includes delay detector status\", async ({ request }) => {\n    const response = await request.get(\"/api/health\");\n    const body = await response.json();\n\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"delayDetector\");\n    expect(body.delayDetector).toHaveProperty(\"trackedTrips\");\n    expect(body.delayDetector).toHaveProperty(\"activeAlerts\");\n    expect(body.delayDetector).toHaveProperty(\"thresholdMultiplier\");\n  });\n\n  test(\"rejects unexpected query parameters\", async ({ request }) => {\n    const response = await request.get(\"/api/health?extra=param\");\n    expect(response.status()).toBe(400);\n\n    const body = await response.json();\n    expect(body).toHaveProperty(\"error\");\n
